approveAndPublishDescription: This will publish the campaign and make it live. Please ensure all content has been reviewed before proceeding.
articleBlockquote: "The transition from manual campaign management to intelligent narrative generation isn't a luxury; it's a survival mechanism in a world of infinite noise."
articleBody1: In the rapidly evolving landscape of digital media, the intersection of technological precision and narrative soul is the new frontier. As businesses across the metropolitan area scramble to adapt, a new breed of automated storytelling is emerging from the heart of the Midwest.
articleBody2: "We are no longer just looking at spreadsheets," says Elena Vance, Chief Data Officer at a local tech startup. "We are looking at stories that happen to be informed by millions of data points. The goal is clarity, not just volume."
articleBody3: As we look toward 2025, the role of the editorialist is shifting. No longer restricted by the mechanical constraints of formatting and distribution, creators are free to focus on the 'why' while platforms like Campaign Engine handle the 'how.'
articleHeadline: The Automated Future: How AI is Reshaping Twin Cities Commerce
audienceAppealBody: Targets high-intent community leaders and conscious consumers in the Twin Cities metro.
campaignImpactBody: Estimated to provide over 460,000 meals based on projected conversion rates from Star Tribune placements.
publishNotYetAvailable: Publishing is not yet available. This will be enabled once the workflow API is ready.
campaignsEmptyDescription: Your campaigns will appear here. Discover a story to create your first campaign.
perspectivesIntro: Invite contributors to share their first-person perspective, then track responses and review submissions as they come in.
quickInviteDescription: Send a personal invitation to one or more contributors.
inviteNeedsContact: Add an email or phone number for each contributor.
inviteInvalidContact: Some contributor details are invalid — check the email and phone fields.
inviteSendFailed: Couldn't send the invitations. Please try again.
bulkOutreachDescription: Paste a list of email addresses to invite several contributors at once.
expansionToolkitDescription: Share a public join link or QR code so contributors can add their perspective on their own.
qrPrintableAsset: Printable asset for events and signage
qrShareDescription: Print or share this code — scanning it opens the contributor join page.
noInvitationsDescription: Invitations you send will appear here.
bulkNoEmails: Enter at least one email address.
bulkInvalidEmails: {{count}} of the addresses are invalid. Fix them and try again.
linkGenerateFailed: Couldn't generate a join link. Please try again.
revokeLinkDescription: Anyone with the current link will no longer be able to join. You can generate a new link at any time.
revokeInvitationDescription: This contributor will no longer be able to use their invitation to join.
anonymityStrictNote: Do not publish real name or affiliation.
anonymityAttributedNote: Name may be published with this perspective.
saveFailed: Couldn't save changes. Please try again.
editLockedForReview: This piece is submitted for review. Pull it back from the Campaign Summary to edit it.
editorSetupFailed: Couldn't open the editor. Please try again.
coreMessageBody: Neighbors helping neighbors: No table left empty this winter.
discardChangesDescription: You have unsaved changes in the editor. Are you sure you want to discard them and return to preview mode?
featuredAssetDescription: The hero image selected for the Star Tribune Sunday Magazine feature story.
generatingCampaignDescription: We're creating your article, display ads, and social posts. This may take a moment.
generationFailedDescription: Something went wrong while generating your campaign content. Please try again.
newsletterAlreadyUpToDate: Newsletter is already up to date.
newsletterStale: Some sibling content has been regenerated. Refresh to update.
newsletterReadyPrompt: All sibling campaign assets are ready. Generate a long-form newsletter body and hero image to copy into your ESP.
newsletterNoHero: This newsletter has no hero image to publish
newsletterPublishFailed: Couldn't publish the newsletter. Please try again.
newsletterWaitingForSiblings: Newsletter becomes available once the article, display ads, paid social, and organic social finish generating.
noPaidSocialPosts: No paid social ads available for this campaign.
noSocialPosts: No social media posts available for this campaign.
strategicNarrativeBody: This campaign leverages the emotional core of community resilience. By positioning the Winter Drive not as a charity act, but as a local civic duty, we bridge the gap between suburban donors and urban food security needs.
summarySubmitRest: Submit the rest, then sign off the campaign.
audienceFillsAsSubmitted: fills as each piece is submitted
rowBackInProgress: Back in progress · a quick fix, then resubmit
governanceActionFailed: Something went wrong. Please try again.
submitCampaignHint: Get all {{total}} pieces submitted first. {{remaining}} to go, then this signs off the whole campaign.
cancelCampaignDescription: This ends the campaign for everyone and can't be undone. Tell us why you're cancelling.
cancelReasonPlaceholder: Why are you cancelling this campaign?
cancelReasonTooShort: Add at least 100 characters explaining the cancellation.
governanceEmptyPreviewDescription: The approval board appears here once the campaign is set up.
governanceEmptyDescription: This story isn't part of a governed campaign yet.
footerSubmittedHint: The publisher is reviewing your campaign. Pull a piece back from its row if you need to change it before they get to it.
footerChangesRequestedHint: Update the flagged pieces in their tabs and mark them ready again. The publisher re-reviews each one as you re-submit it.
footerApprovedHint: The publisher approved your campaign and will schedule it next.
footerScheduledHint: Your campaign is scheduled to go live.
